# Dreamy Tales

> Personalised illustrated bedtime short stories delivered nightly to South African families at 6pm SAST.

Dreamy Tales is a subscription service for parents of children aged 3–12. Each evening, a custom AI-written bedtime short story with illustrations arrives as a PDF in your inbox — featuring your child's name, interests, and South African settings.

## Services

- Nightly personalised bedtime short stories (30+ per month)
- Custom illustrations and child-specific storylines
- Stories in English or Afrikaans (more SA languages coming soon)
- Illustrated PDF delivered by email at 6pm South African time
- Parent dashboard to download past stories and manage subscription

## Pricing

- R99/month for the first child
- R50/month for each additional child
- 7-day free trial
- Annual option: pay 11 months, get 12 (one month free)
- Secure payments via PayFast (South Africa)
